summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Edit Finished Products and Intermediate Goods features. Backend tests: 20/20 passed. Frontend UI verified all key features present and functional.

issues: data-testid attributes present in code but Expo React Native web may not render them to DOM - this is expected behavior

seed_data_creation: Used existing data: VI and VI Super intermediate goods, VI has recipe (Lubricanting Oil: 0.8, Polymer: 0.2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Finished Products and Intermediate Goods features fully functional. Polymer raw material has 0 stock - manufacturing VI will fail due to insufficient Polymer. VI has 170.0 litres as raw material stock (previously manufactured). VI Super now has a recipe set via tests.

edit_finished_products.details: Owner can see edit (pencil) button in blue on Finished Products list. Edit modal has Name, Pack Size, Linked Loose Oil, Linked Packing Material fields. PUT /api/owner/edit-finished-product endpoint works. Manager gets 403 when trying to edit.

intermediate_goods_crud.details: GET /api/stock/intermediate-goods returns VI and VI Super. POST /api/owner/add-intermediate-good works for owner. DELETE /api/owner/delete-intermediate-good works. Manager gets 403 on all owner-only endpoints.

intermediate_goods_recipes.details: GET /api/intermediate-recipes returns recipes. VI shows recipe (Lubricanting Oil: 0.8, Polymer: 0.2). POST /api/owner/set-intermediate-recipe works. VI Super was set via tests.

intermediate_goods_manufacturing.details: POST /api/manager/manufacture-intermediate-good works for manager role. Returns 403 for owner. Returns 400 for insufficient stock. Returns 400 when no recipe set. Returns 404 for non-existent intermediate good.

intermediate_goods_ui_owner.details: Items page shows Intermediate Goods section with VI and VI Super cards. VI shows recipe (per 1 litres), stock, raw material stock. Add Intermediate Good button visible (pink). Edit Recipe / Set Recipe buttons visible. Delete button (red trash) visible.

intermediate_goods_ui_manager.details: Factory Actions page shows Intermediate Goods section with 'Manufacture Intermediate Good' action button (pink). Workflow Guide explains steps including manufacturing intermediate goods.

access_control.details: Owner-only endpoints (add/delete intermediate good, set recipe, edit finished product) return 403 for manager. Manager-only endpoint (manufacture intermediate good) returns 403 for owner.
